item.title: Good News – The Parley's Wildlife Overpass In Utah Is Working
item.description: Utah Transportation: "Good News We Could All Use: The Parley's Wildlife Overpass Is Working." Thanks Blake Ledbetter (@blakethy) and @usuaggielife for leading the study. #awesome #animals #wildlife #aww #mildly_interesting

item.title: Disney website crash due the volume of cancellations.
item.description: Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes you guys. Just to be clear, this is a meme about the Simpsons, the various logos on there are a coincidence. This post shouldn’t be your motivation to go out, get a VPN subscription, and do crime-y things like torrenting shows and movies. Jokes aside, a lot of VPN providers will drop their prices for the holidays. I bought the security suite from a company whose name rhymes with electron for pretty good discount during that time. My main intention was to drop gmail (google in general) when I signed up but I was so happy with the overall service (email, vpn, calendar, drive etc) that I convinced my siblings to switch.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: TIL Disney Adults are a thing
item.description: https://www.glamour.com/story/the-jimmy-kimmel-and-disney-drama-has-some-superfans-dumping-the-mouse https://bsky.app/profile/ruemcclammyhand.bsky.social/post/3lzcefeajk22v In case you don’t want to read the article, it’s basically Disney approved influencers who create content and a few of them have decided to stop in light of the kimmel suspension.

item.title: Telling it like it is.
item.description: As a member of the eX-Men myself, I approve of Nightcrawler's message. The amount of hate coming from the White House about 'the trans problem', the desperate push to frame gun violence as a trans problem, the vile narrative that we are mentally ill dangerous predators that 'somebody should look into' and 'do something about'... I'm getting 1930s-1940s vibes. Records of trans people date back to antiquity. There was even briefly a trans woman as Empress of Rome. We've always been here. We'll always be here. We aren't going away.
item.dc:creator: ThatOtherGirlYouKnow

item.title: Bacha bazi ('boy play') refers to a pederastic practice in Afghanistan and in historical Turkestan, in which men exploit and enslave adolescent boys sometimes for sexual abuse, and/or coerce them to cross-dress

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Invincibility - Part 1
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Bean in a bag! Another bean-bag! If she fits, she sits. Bean loves bags of all shapes and sizes so long as they're big enough for her to hide inside of. Sorry for another late post. The next few days are probably going to be lots of late posts. If I miss a day, I apologize in advance. Preparing for surgery on Tuesday so lots of fun days of little sleep and lots of pain. Hopefully I'll see you all tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.111 ESCALATOR
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Alexey Egorov
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Hollow & Akimbo - Singularity YouTube: https://youtu.be/XQrsnQACPW8?si=LDL57075jMiTTokf Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/5MUBGwW2DHLVozCq56C0lr?si=b3702dc589184fdc
ICM Original / https://twitter.com/PathosMeta
Fernanda Suarez
Filip Pagliuso
Anato Finnstark
Victor Hugo
Sergey Semeno
Nemo Art
Casey weldon
Franco Carlesi
Rui Li
Jonathan Aceituno
Rui Li
Tea Me
Rafael Rocha
Anton Fadeev
Nikulina Helena
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Misc Memes Vol 2
item.description: As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd Miscellaneous and Videos https://imgur.com/gallery/0k0ca7O NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps
